steps.title: Identify the slope
steps.content:
Line $t$ is already in slope-intercept form:
$$
y=-\frac{1}{5}x+18
$$
So the slope of line $t$ is $-\frac{1}{5}$.

steps.title: Take the negative reciprocal
steps.content: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of $-\frac{1}{5}$ is $5$, so line $s$ has slope $5$. The answer is B.
